question: Give me all the mélodies (French art songs) for baritone voice between 1870 and 1913.
sparql:
PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX doremus: <http://data.doremus.org/>
PREFIX efrbroo: <http://erlangen-crm.org/efrbroo/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX ecrm: <http://erlangen-crm.org/current/>
SELECT ?work WHERE {
  ?work a doremus:00058f84-0f6d-451a-9a16-184cca5c5472 .
  ?work efrbroo:R25_performed ?performance .
  ?performance ecrm:P14i_performed ?medium .
  ?medium a doremus:01d4b9c5-d368-3815-81d3-14624a3b4c17 .
  ?work dct:created ?date .
  FILTER (xsd:gYear(?date) >= 1870 && xsd:gYear(?date) <= 1913)
}
execution_result: Got no rows and 1 columns in 0.22s
